subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the one who entereth the garden and maketh mention of God, his Lord, the All-Merciful. O followers of this Wronged One! When ye reach the door thereof, halt and say
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن یدخل البستان و یذکر الله ربه الرحمن یا حزب المظلوم اذا بلغتم بابه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @visitation Tablets, @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
